svg.title: GitHub Actions Self-Hosted Runner Architectures
svg.desc: Comparison of 6 runner architectures: DinD, DooD, Rootless, VM-per-job, ARC pod, and bare metal node.

g.text: Runner pod runs a privileged Docker daemon inside the container
Mounts the node's /var/run/docker.sock into the runner pod
3. Rootless / daemonless builders (Kaniko, Buildah, BuildKit rootless)
No Docker daemon at all — build tools run unprivileged inside the runner pod
Each job gets its own lightweight microVM — full kernel isolation
Kubernetes operator; spins up a fresh runner pod per workflow job
Long-lived runner process on a dedicated EC2 node — no containers

svg.text: Click any box to ask a follow-up question
